Hardware Component File

tachy VDO digital 1381 CALIS

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference tachy_VDO_digital_1381_CALIS.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr EE
Functional Name Controlographe

Associated Devices

Buttons / KBD error ID:
Calibration error ID:
Calibration memory, read/ write error ID:
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal ID:
CAN, bus off ID:
CAN, internal error ID:
Card reader 1 error ID:
Card reader 2 error ID:

Driver Card 2 error ID:
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card) ID:
Error in Internal display ID:
Events with no other DTC ID:
Faults with no other DTC ID:
Handling errors with no other DTC ID:
Internal error in sensor ID:
No ignition, but speed pulses present ID:
No speed signal from sensor - no signal ID:
PreOverspeedAlert ID:
Printer error ID:
Printer paper out, no paper ID:
Program memory, checksum error ID:
Speed pulse output Recording Unit (B7) ID:
Time / Date error ID:
Recording Unit - internal error ID:
Sensor power supply ID:
Invalid speed signal or data link error ID:
Tachograph power supply ID:
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal ID:

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
